name: Papercups
description: Papercups — OSS customer messaging and live chat platform with REST API and Slack integration for support workflows.

seo.title: Papercups — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Papercups: Papercups — OSS customer messaging and live chat platform with REST API and Slack integration for support workflows.

when_to_use: OSS live chat with self-hosted Slack integration
REST API for custom customer support workflows
Open-source Intercom alternative for budget-conscious teams
Embed chat widget in product with full data ownership
Support inbox with Slack notification for small teams

review.verdict: Reasonable OSS chat option when self-hosting matters, but Chatwoot generally has more active development now.
review.best_for: Small teams self-hosting customer chat for privacy
review.not_for: Companies wanting fully-managed support with rich features

transparency.reason: free OSS with paid cloud option
